creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On Wed, 20 Nov 2013 16:07:40 +0100
Tijl Coosemans <tijl@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Hi,
> 
> Can you try rebuilding opencv one more time?  The OpenEXR port got new
> library versions and the errors indicate opencv is still using the old
> OpenEXR libraries.


Confirmed, after the change to rev. "_1" opencv compiled well again.
Thank you very much.
